title: Tick Control White Plains NY
metaDescription: Professional tick control in White Plains, NY starting at $125. Expert tick removal & prevention for homes and yards. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: White Plains residents face increasing tick populations due to the area's proximity to parks and wooded areas. Our professional tick control services protect your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses with comprehensive yard treatments. Best Pest Control NYC provides effective, eco-friendly tick extermination throughout White Plains and Westchester County.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of tick control expertise to White Plains, using EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while being highly effective against deer ticks, dog ticks, and other species. Our licensed technicians understand Westchester's unique tick challenges and provide guaranteed seasonal protection with flexible scheduling to fit your needs.
localContext: White Plains' beautiful neighborhoods near Chatterton Hill, Battle Hill, and Saxon Woods Park create ideal tick habitats, making professional tick control essential for homeowners. From historic properties downtown to suburban homes near Kensico Dam Plaza, we protect all types of White Plains residences with customized treatment plans.

faqs.question: What is the cost of tick control in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in White Plains range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, tick infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages that provide continuous protection throughout tick season from April through October.

faqs.question: When is tick season in White Plains, NY?
faqs.answer: Tick season in White Plains typically runs from early April through late October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active any time temperatures are above freezing, so year-round vigilance is recommended, especially near wooded areas and parks.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my family and pets in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered tick control products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our trained professionals. Treatments typically require a 2-3 hour drying period before the yard is safe for use, and we provide detailed safety instructions for every application.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide tick control service in White Plains?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day tick control services for White Plains residents in most cases. Our team serves all White Plains neighborhoods and can typically schedule an initial inspection within 24 hours, with treatment following immediately or at your convenience.
